#Imports
import json

import com.microsoft.spark.sqlanalytics
from com.microsoft.spark.sqlanalytics.Constants import Constants

from pyspark.sql.types import IntegerType, StringType, DecimalType

#Get Parameter from controldb
db_port = 1433
linked_service_name = "LS_SQL_ELTFrameworkDB"
lake_db_name = "gold"
db_notebookname= "esg_historical_data_dedicated_sql"
linkedServiceProperties = json.loads(mssparkutils.credentials.getPropertiesAll(linked_service_name))
sql_server_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Endpoint')
db_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Database')
#print(linkedServiceProperties)
access_token = mssparkutils.credentials.getConnectionStringOrCreds(linked_service_name)

db_query ="SELECT A.*,B.NotebookParameterId,B.ParameterType,B.Value  FROM [CTL].[CFG_NOTEBOOK] A LEFT JOIN [CTL].[CFG_NOTEBOOK_PARAMETER] B ON A.NotebookId = B.NotebookId"

df = spark.read.format("jdbc") \
    .option("url", "jdbc:sqlserver://%s:%s" % (sql_server_name, db_port)) \
    .option("query", db_query) \
    .option("accessToken", access_token) \
    .option("encrypt", "true") \
    .option("databaseName", db_name) \
    .option("hostNameInCertificate", "*.database.windows.net") \
    .load()

df2 = df.where(df.NotebookPath==db_notebookname)
#display(df2)

#Synapse Dedicated Server detials
SynapseDedicatedServer = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_storage').collect()[0]['SynapseDedicatedServer'] 
TempFolder = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_storage').collect()[0]['TempFolder']
SynapseDedicatedDatabase = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_storage').collect()[0]['SynapseDedicatedDatabase']

#Cast Columns to match target Data types
final_df = (spark_df.withColumn("FinancialYear", spark_df["FinancialYear"].cast(StringType())) 
       .withColumn("FYYearStartMonthKey", spark_df["FYYearStartMonthKey"].cast(IntegerType())) 
       .withColumn("FYYearEndMonthKey", spark_df["FYYearEndMonthKey"].cast(IntegerType())) 
       .withColumn("SiteCode", spark_df["SiteCode"].cast(StringType())) 
       .withColumn("ElectricityConsumptionMWh", spark_df["ElectricityConsumptionMWh"].cast(DecimalType(20, 2))) 
       .withColumn("ExportedGenerationMWh", spark_df["ExportedGenerationMWh"].cast(DecimalType(20, 2))) 
       .withColumn("GHGIntensityLocationBasedTCO2ePerMWh", spark_df["GHGIntensityLocationBasedTCO2ePerMWh"].cast(DecimalType(20, 10))) 
       .withColumn("GHGIntensityMarketBasedTCO2ePerMWh", spark_df["GHGIntensityMarketBasedTCO2ePerMWh"].cast(DecimalType(20, 10))) 
       .withColumn("GridImportMWh", spark_df["GridImportMWh"].cast(DecimalType(20, 2))) 
       .withColumn("NaturalGasConsumptionGJ", spark_df["NaturalGasConsumptionGJ"].cast(DecimalType(20, 2))) 
       .withColumn("RenewableComponentPercentage", spark_df["RenewableComponentPercentage"].cast(DecimalType(20, 2))) 
       .withColumn("RoundTripEfficiencyPercentage", spark_df["RoundTripEfficiencyPercentage"].cast(DecimalType(20, 10))) 
       .withColumn("StationEfficiencyPercent", spark_df["StationEfficiencyPercent"].cast(DecimalType(20, 10))) 
       .withColumn("TotalGrossGenerationMWh", spark_df["TotalGrossGenerationMWh"].cast(DecimalType(20, 2))) 
       .withColumn("TotalScope2GHGLocationBasedTCO2e", spark_df["TotalScope2GHGLocationBasedTCO2e"].cast(DecimalType(20, 2))) 
       .withColumn("TotalScope2GHGMarketBasedTCO2e", spark_df["TotalScope2GHGMarketBasedTCO2e"].cast(DecimalType(20, 2))) 
       .withColumn("TotalScope2GHGLocationBasedAuxLossOnlyTCO2e", spark_df["TotalScope2GHGLocationBasedAuxLossOnlyTCO2e"].cast(DecimalType(20, 2))) 
       .withColumn("TotalScope2GHGMarketBasedAuxLossOnlyTCO2e", spark_df["TotalScope2GHGMarketBasedAuxLossOnlyTCO2e"].cast(DecimalType(20, 2))) 
       .withColumn("TotalScope1GHGTCO2e", spark_df["TotalScope1GHGTCO2e"].cast(DecimalType(20, 2)))
       )

#display(final_df)

# Configure and submit the request to write to Synapse Dedicated SQL Pool

(final_df.write
.option(Constants.SERVER, f"""{SynapseDedicatedServer}""")
.option(Constants.TEMP_FOLDER, (f"""abfss://temp@{TempFolder}/{dedicated_db_tablename}_staging"""))
.mode("overwrite")
.synapsesql(f"""{SynapseDedicatedDatabase}.dbo.{dedicated_db_tablename}"""))
